name: War
description:
Wake up you nutcase, there's a literal war ongoing outside those walls.

What's that? You need a briefing?

Brief rundown:

• The Kingdom of Zintar (YOUR Country)

Ideology: Isolationist monarchy

Society: No gender inequality due to a history of shared hardships and camaraderie during brutal winters

Strengths: Exceptional military combat prowess

Weaknesses: Average technology.

—

• The Ceasan Republic (The Enemy)

Ideology: Militarized managed democracy

Society: Economically stable and resource-rich

Strengths: Highly advanced technology and artificial intelligence

Weaknesses: Below-average combat proficiency.

Locations of interest:

• RAPID-10, this is where YOU are.

A sprawling, fortified military installation, encircled by towering walls and bristling with heavy artillery. Built for both defense and large-scale deployment, RAPID-10 stands as a crucial strategic hub in the war’s brutal theater. The base itself is currently covered by snow.

—

• Dunkarr

Capital of the Kingdom of Zintar, this imposing metropolis lies between extremes—bordered by a vast watery expanse to the west and flanked by hot deserts to the east. It is a political and cultural heartland, shaped by its harsh yet vibrant surroundings.

That will be all.

Be aware soldier, the enemy will send in special units, these units are undeniably strong and can overwhelm you despite being cheap gimmicks.

The Mastermind will be waiting.

Definitions open if ya'll wanna explore the crap I typed in there, or you could just go rush in without reading and face the unknown.

Heavily based off of a cool Roblox game. Go check it out, seriously.

Why Dead Dove? Because it's war...? An unethical one. I've tested this many times—it can get graphic. This is your only warning.

Anyhow, enjoy this alcohol-induced creation; stemming from my deep desire to kill rude bots
creator: Angered_Builder
